---
layout: default
title: Instructions
---

# Instructions

How to Do laundry

This is a guide on how to wash and dry your laundry in an effect and quick way. While, cleaning all clothes without damage or missing dirty clothing.

Washing:

Step 1) Open the lid of the washing machine by pulling up on the front handle located on the middle-bottom of the machine (Figure1).

![How to Open a Locked Washing Machine Door: A Step-by-Step Guide - Clean ...](data:image/jpeg;base64,)



Figure 1. "Open Washing Machine doors" \[Photo by alamy\]

Step 2) Put dirty clothes inside the open chamber while not passing the white cylinder in the center(Figure 2).


![alt text](Picture2.jpg)

Figure 2. "Loading laundry into the machine" \[Photo by lead household\]

Step 3) Place one 3 in 1 Tide Pod inside the machine to clean the clothes.

Step 4) Set the machine settings to medium for its power and set the water temperature to cold. The machine will run for 39 minutes after this.

Drying:

Step 5) Once the clothes in the wash are finished take them out and place them in the dryer by pulling on the handle located on the front mid-right side of the machine (Figure 3).

![](data:image/png;base64,)


![alt text](Picture3.jpg)

Figure 3. "Loading clothes into the dryer" \[Device Report\]

Step 6) Set dryers settings to medium power and wait for 60 minutes for completion.

Step 7) After an hour has passed retrieving clothes from dryer. Once finished, clean lint trap located on the bottom ring of the washer by pulling it and whipping all lint into the garbage. This is important to do so because if not done this can result in a fire. (Figure 4).

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)



Figure 4. "Cleaning lint trap" \[thumb tack\]
